reviewReply.comment: Hola, buenas tardes!. No tenemos servicio de GNC. Saludos!

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de playa. Baños limpios, solo faltaría que el shop sea Full para poder abonar con la app

(Translated by Google)
Excellent beach service. Clean bathrooms. The only thing missing is a full shop so you can pay with the app.

reviewReply.comment: Hola, Buen día!. Gracias por su comentario!. Lo esperamos nuevamente. Saludos!.

reviews.comment:

Very good place, well run, with many very clean bathrooms and fast food and drinks

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNyOGFIbVVREAE

reviews.comment:
El lugar tiene todo para el viajero.
Eso sí, hay que tener paciencia porque se llena de gente, sobre todo en épocas de vacaciones o fin de semana largo.

(Translated by Google)
The place has everything a traveler could want.
However, you need to be patient because it gets very crowded, especially during holidays or long weekends.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su comentario. Lo esperamos nuevamente!. Saludos!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNydm96RWhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Viaje de Cba a Chaco dos veces en un mes, las dos veces que pase y cargue combustible eterna la cola, solo dos surtidores y un solo playero atendiendo. Es un punto donde pasa muchísima gente, deberían de mejorar eso. Lo mismo en el shop para que te atiendan, además de que te cobran el agua caliente que es gratis en otras estaciones de servicio mucha espera por una ficha.
Los baños siempre impecables.

(Translated by Google)
I traveled from Córdoba to Chaco twice in one month, and both times I stopped to fill up, the line was endless. There were only two pumps and one attendant working. It's a very busy spot; they really need to improve that. The same goes for the convenience store; you have to wait a long time to get served, and they charge for hot water, which is free at other stations, and you have to wait a lot for a token.

The restrooms are always spotless.

reviewReply.comment: Buen día!. Vamos a tener en cuenta su comentario para mejorar. Saludos!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURMeF9UQ0pREAE

reviews.comment:
Buen precio por ser ypf, pero siempre lenta la atención, en temporada alta la fila es interminable.

(Translated by Google)
Good price for being a YPF, but the service is always slow; in high season the line is endless.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su comentario!. tendremos en cuenta su sugerencia para reforzar el personal en temporada alta. Saludos!
